{{Quote|I was recruited by a man called Tyranus on one of the moons of Bogden.|Jango Fett|<ref name="Episode 2">{{Film|II}}</ref>}}
'''Kohlma''', also known as the '''Moon of the Dead''', was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]].

==History==
[[File:SW_Insider_Kohlma.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Jango Fett aboard the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] approaching Dooku's Lair on Kohlma.]]
Following a catastrophic war on [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]], Kohlma was set up as a memorial tomb for those who had fallen. It would later be the secret hideout for [[Komari Vosa]]<ref name="Komari Vosa article">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20021121komari|text=Komari Vosa}}</ref> and her cult, the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]].

After their defeat, it was also where [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] was recruited by [[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]] to become the template of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone army]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] visited Bogden in ''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'' and landed on [[Bogg 4]]. It has been speculated that Bogg 4 is in actuality Kohlma, however, in this case, it is much more likely that Kohlma is the one unnumbered [[Moon/Legends|moon]] mentioned in the book as being "covered from pole to pole in gravestones".

''Labyrinth of Evil'' states that [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] was recruited by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] to be the prime template for the clone army on Bogg 4<ref name="LoE">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref> while other sources state that he was recruited on another moon, Kohlma.<ref name="Star Wars: Bounty Hunter">''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''</ref> [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett's]] StarWars.com Databank entry however, stated ''"a man named Tyranus approached Jango on the '''moons''' of Bogden with an intriguing proposal"''<ref name="Jango Fett Databank entry">{{DB|character|jangofett|Fett, Jango}}</ref> This would imply that his actual recruitment took place, over an extended period of time, on a number of locations with the final sealing of the deal taking place on either Kohlma or [[Bogg 4]].

In ''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'', Kohlma is misspelled as "Kholma".
